decisions.rationale: Milestones panel inner layout (ai_RNbBHXja grid, relapse section) is explicitly scoped to JOURNAL-05-milestones-and-relapse-list. JOURNAL-01 AC-2 only requires tab-panel visibility toggling on ai_RNbBHXjO; criteria_audit and ui_evidence both pass for the panel marker. Placeholder copy inside the panel does not block JOURNAL-02, whose depends_on gate is satisfied by tab chrome and journal-tab-content mount point.

Missing bubble ids (ai_RNbBHXin, ai_RNbBHXiu, ai_RNbBHXiv) and IR style_refs on brownfield entries are assigned to JOURNAL-02-journal-entries-list per decompose scope. JOURNAL-01 ui_refs end at ai_RNbBHXil; ai_RNbBHXim panel marker passes. Review ui_evidence notes inner entities are expected downstream. Prototype entries as journalTab prop preserve FV-3 brownfield behavior without blocking JOURNAL-02 migration.

useJournalTabStore as a co-located React hook is appropriate for JOURNAL-01: tab state is consumed by JournalPageContent and JournalTabBar within the same subtree. No downstream item in depends_on requires cross-component tab persistence or a global store. Naming is a minor documentation concern, not an AC or architecture violation for this item.

Responsive Tailwind overrides (max-w-md, flex-1, border-0) are polish beyond JOURNAL-01 AC-3, which passes bubbleStyle() token resolution on named tab bar elements. Minor layout delta from IR fixed-width tab bar does not fail criteria_audit or block downstream items; reconcile fit_width fluid semantics in a later responsive pass.

summary: Review passed at 100% coverage with 0 blockers. Triage: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Deferred: C-1 → JOURNAL-05-milestones-and-relapse-list (milestones panel content); C-2 → JOURNAL-02-journal-entries-list (entries grid bubble ids and IR styles); C-4 → responsive polish (tab bar fit_width). Accepted: C-3 (local hook pattern sufficient for tab chrome scope). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
